title: wrightia siamensis
intro: Wrightia siamensis, also known as Siam Wrightia, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Wrightia siamensis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, and alleviating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Wrightia siamensis include making tea from its leaves and roots, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, and also its bark is used to make a paste for external application to treat skin conditions.
